goal: Create one special skill outgoing VFX prompt and one on-hit status overlay prompt for every tower.
workflow: Generate effect images in ChatGPT, then remove the black background in post-processing and composite them in-game.
render_note: Outgoing effects are isolated cast/projectile images. Hit overlays are body-wrap effects designed to be composited around a monster sprite with an open center.
retry_note: If the result includes a tower, a monster, a weapon, or turns into a floor decal or a full magic circle, retry with this sentence appended: remove all units and scenery, keep only one isolated VFX element on a pure black background, keep the center mostly open for an enemy sprite, wrap the effect around an invisible target body, and do not place it on the ground.
outgoing_effect_style_guide: cyberpunk tower defense VFX asset, premium mobile game special skill cast effect illustration, effect-only image, single outgoing VFX element, centered composition, full effect visible, enough empty margin, pure black background, high contrast glow, readable silhouette, no tower, no monster, no weapon source, no environment, no floor, no smoke clouds, no debris chunks, no text, no logo, no watermark
hit_overlay_style_guide: cyberpunk tower defense VFX asset, premium mobile game status overlay illustration, effect-only image, single body-wrap VFX element, centered composition, full effect visible, enough empty margin, pure black background, high contrast glow, readable silhouette, designed to wrap around an invisible enemy sprite, keep the center mostly open for compositing, floating around the target body rather than painted on the floor, no tower, no monster, no character body, no environment, no floor decal, no smoke clouds, no debris chunks, no text, no logo, no watermark
